animationContract.ink: body: scale, squash, hit flash, attack offset
animationContract.accent: ornament: follows ink with 1-2 frame lag
animationContract.shadow: smear: low alpha drag and impact echo
animationContract.clips: shared actor clips: idle, attack, hit, death, skill
animationContract.keyframes: layer transform keys with linear, easeInOut or step interpolation

unit.qiang.note: 现有PNG序列已合成，但保留木/仓双部件语义；不可把烘焙帧误报为独立图层。
